'''gabopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalid|scalid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalid|scalid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gabopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæbepeth|gæbepeth]] || [[word:gæbepej|gæbepej]] || [[word:gæbepesh|gæbepesh]] || [[word:gæbepe|gæbepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gabobopoth|gabobopoth]] || [[word:gabobopoj|gabobopoj]] || [[word:gaboboposh|gaboboposh]] || [[word:gabobopo|gabobopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gabopoth|gabopoth]] || [[word:gabopoj|gabopoj]] || [[word:gaboposh|gaboposh]] || [[word:gabopo|gabopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gabofpoth|gabofpoth]] || [[word:gabofpoj|gabofpoj]] || [[word:gabofposh|gabofposh]] || [[word:gabofpof|gabofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gabopotho|gabopotho]] || [[word:gabopojo|gabopojo]] || [[word:gaboposho|gaboposho]] || [[word:gabopoko|gabopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gabopoth|gabopoth]] || [[word:gabopoj|gabopoj]] || [[word:gaboposh|gaboposh]] || [[word:gabopo|gabopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gabopothol|gabopothol]] || [[word:gabopojol|gabopojol]] || [[word:gaboposhol|gaboposhol]] || [[word:gabopokol|gabopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gabopothotho|gabopothotho]] || [[word:gabopojojo|gabopojojo]] || [[word:gaboposhosho|gaboposhosho]] || [[word:gabopoko|gabopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gabopothon|gabopothon]] || [[word:gabopojon|gabopojon]] || [[word:gaboposhon|gaboposhon]] || [[word:gabopokon|gabopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gabopothoro|gabopothoro]] || [[word:gabopojoro|gabopojoro]] || [[word:gaboposhoro|gaboposhoro]] || [[word:gabopokoro|gabopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
